title: io.denna.defi.distribution-rewards-partners
description: Per-star partner list for distribution rewards. Each star maintains its own file with referral codes and per-partner rate overrides.

star.description: Star/prime identifier. Must match the folder name in the repository (e.g., spark, grove, obex).

codeRange.description: The referral code range owned by this star. Codes falling within this range are routed to this star.

from.description: Start of the referral code range (inclusive).

to.description: End of the referral code range (inclusive).

partners.description: Partners belonging to this star, with referral codes and optional rate overrides.

partner.description: A partner with a referral code and optional rate override.

referralCode.description: The referral code that identifies this partner's activity on farms.

additionalAPY.description: Per-partner additional APY override. If omitted, defaultAdditionalAPY from the shared config applies.

farms.description: Restrict this partner to specific farm IDs. If omitted, partner is active on all farms.
